Description: A stand-alone retail / convenience store located in Shenzhen, China. The building footprint is approximately 38.7 m (east-west) by 25.8 m (north-south), rectangular, with the long axis rotated 90 degrees from north. Total gross floor area is about 1000.0 m^2 spread over 1 floor(s), giving roughly 1000.0 m^2 per floor. Floor-to-floor height is 3.9 m. The building is divided into 4 thermal zones in total (about 4 per floor). Typical space layout: retail area + storeroom + office + restroom. Window-to-wall ratio is approximately 40% on exterior walls, with windows distributed on all four facades. Model all zones with appropriate constructions, glazing, occupancy, lighting, equipment and HVAC (ideal loads) so the IDF runs in EnergyPlus without errors.
